mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `media_ref` ( owner_id, draft_id, note_id, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_key, public_url, file_name, media_type, content_type, size_bytes, etag, upload_status, sort_order, bound_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{ownerId}, #{draftId}, #{noteId}, #{storageProvider}, #{bucketName}, #{objectKey}, #{publicUrl}, #{fileName}, #{mediaType}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{etag}, #{uploadStatus}, #{sortOrder}, #{boundAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, owner_id, draft_id, note_id, storage_provider, bucket_name, object_key, public_url, file_name, media_type, content_type, size_bytes, etag, upload_status, sort_order, bound_at, created_at, updated_at FROM `media_ref` WHERE draft_id = #{draftId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
